hooks.command:
cat <<'HOOK'
IMPORTANT RULE: When responding to channel messages from stj-channel, you MUST use edit_message to show your work in real-time. The user sees ONLY what you send via reply/edit_message.

Protocol:
1. The channel auto-sends an initial reply("Analisando...") — you receive its message_id in the tool result
2. After each search, call edit_message with cumulative progress showing what you searched and found
3. Final edit_message contains the complete analysis with cited precedents

Never wait until the end. The user needs to see progress as you work.
HOOK
